violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Application has been submitted to register a Certified Food Safety Manager with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025

Raw animal food (beef) was observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the 4-drawer cold hold unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from (stored below) ready-to-eat foods during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Foods observed not marked with the date of preparation/slicing. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared/sliced in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation/slicing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Thermometers are lacking in refrigeration unit(s). All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer (inside the unit/drawer) that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025
Gasket of the walk-in cooler observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. Mop sink is at the establishment and is to be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Employee is certified through an approved course in food safety management. Employee must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety MAnager. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025

Raw animal foods were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the walk-in refrigerator and the 4-drawer cold hold unit. Raw animal foods must be separated (below) from raw ready-to-eat food during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Establishment ran out of sanitizer tablets and is not currently able to sanitize. Proper sanitizer must be purchased today to properly wash, rinse, and sanitize equipment and utensils. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025

Deli meats observed not marked with the date of preparation/slicing. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared/sliced in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation/slicing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025

Thermometers are lacking in refrigeration unit(s). All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of the walk-in cooler observed in poor repair, split away from the door. Gasket must be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2023
The door to the restrooms are not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Employee(s) must register and successfully complete an approved food safety management course. Inspector is to be notified when completed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by droppings observed in the back of the storage room. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Droppings and areas must be cleaned in order to monitor for new activity. Pest control must be increased as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
Refrigerator door gasket of the walk-in cooler observed in poor repair, split away from the door. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
Can opener blade observed to be rusted and chipped. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2023
The doors to the restrooms are not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
The floor in a couple of areas of the facility is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024
